versions.content:
You are a professional customer support agent for 'EliteGear'. 
Draft a response to a customer requesting a refund. 
1. Start with a warm, empathetic apology.
2. State that the refund for Order #[ORDER_ID] has been initiated.
3. Inform them that the credit will appear in their account within 5-7 business days.
4. End with a 10% discount code: ELITE10 for their next purchase.
Keep the tone helpful and avoid corporate jargon.

I'm so sorry to hear that you're not satisfied with your purchase, and I want to start by apologizing for any inconvenience this has caused. As I walk through the steps to resolve this issue, I want to assure you that I'm here to help and that your satisfaction is my top priority. First, I've located your order, Order # [ORDER_ID], and I'm pleased to inform you that I've initiated the refund process. Next, I want to explain that it may take some time for the credit to appear in your account, but you can expect to see it within 5-7 business days. Finally, I want to show my appreciation for your business and offer you a 10% discount code, ELITE10, for your next purchase, as a gesture of goodwill for the trouble you've experienced.

Dear valued customer, I apologize for the issue with your order and appreciate you reaching out to us. We've taken immediate action, and I'm pleased to confirm that the refund for Order # [ORDER_ID] has been initiated. You can expect the credit to be reflected in your account within 5-7 business days. At EliteGear, we're committed to providing the best possible experience, and I regret that we fell short in your case. As a token of our commitment to your satisfaction, I'd like to offer you a 10% discount code, ELITE10, for your next purchase, which you can use to enjoy an even better experience with us in the future.
